key_points: Even numbers are numbers divisible by 2
Odd numbers are numbers that are not divisible by 2
Multiples are obtained by multiplying a number by integers
Factors are numbers that divide another number exactly
Divisibility rules help check whether a number is divisible by another number
formulas: Multiple of a number → n × k
exam_tips: Check divisibility by 2 using the last digit
Numbers ending with 0 or 5 are divisible by 5
Add digits to check divisibility by 3 or 9
Write factors carefully when solving factor problems
